message:
fix(combinator): FIFO grant ordering in bulkhead, CAS-safe failure streak in circuit breaker, and token refund on rate limit cancel

bulkhead: Grant all eligible waiting entries instead of just the first,
but stop at the first ungrantable entry to preserve strict FIFO order.
Previously returned after the first grant, leaving subsequent grantable
entries unserved and causing head-of-line blocking.

circuit_breaker: Move current_failure_streak.store() inside the successful
CAS branches rather than before the CAS attempt. Prevents concurrent
retries from observing an incorrect streak count when the CAS fails and
the state is re-read.

race: Replace SmallVec<[(usize, Outcome<T, E>); 4]> with plain Vec in
race_all_outcomes to avoid redundant into_vec() allocation when the
SmallVec is already heap-spilled.

rate_limit: Remove cancelled entries from the queue entirely via
queue.remove(idx) instead of just marking them cancelled in-place. If the
entry was already granted, refund the tokens to prevent token leakage.
Add regression test (tests/rate_limit_leak.rs) validating the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
